decisions.title: Use PostgreSQL for primary database
decisions.rationale: JSONB support, FTS5 equivalent, team familiarity

decisions.title: Implement JWT with refresh token rotation
decisions.rationale: Stateless auth, works across services, industry standard

facts.content: Rate limiter uses sliding window algorithm

next_steps: Write integration tests for auth flow
Set up CI pipeline with security scanning
Document API endpoints in OpenAPI spec
